16.reason: [MAX is not a compile-time constant; use #define instead to avoid variable-length array error]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.1 , reason:  [MAX is not a compile-time constant; use #define instead to avoid variable-length array error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1 , reason:  Error: 'const' variables are not true compile-time constants in C for array sizing at file scope, causing 'variably modified' error. Use #define MAX 10000 instead.
